examples: The process of establishing a literary canon is seen by some as, in part, an attempt by certain scholars to make their own labors central and to relegate the work of others to marginal status.
In fact, you even relegate font sizes to the proverbial dust heap, and use percentages.
If you say this is the most important, then you relegate the other facts of life to a secondary position.
Holding up a corporate flight may relegate you to the airlines in the future.
Koubek beat Greg Rusedski in the decisive rubber to relegate Britain from the Davis Cup World Group.
